text: If you are in immediate danger or having suicidal thoughts, please call the National Suicide Prevention Lifeline at 988 or go to the nearest emergency room.
The '5-4-3-2-1' Grounding Technique: Name 5 things you see, 4 you can touch, 3 you hear, 2 you can smell, and 1 you can taste. This helps reduce anxiety in the moment.
The University Counseling Center is located in Building A, Room 204. Open Mon-Fri 9am-5pm. Walk-ins are welcome for urgent needs.
Research shows that 7-9 hours of sleep is critical for student mental health. Try to maintain a consistent sleep schedule even on weekends.
